value_signal: Userlytics says people can make money online by testing websites, prototypes, advertisements, and videos, with PayPal payment after approval.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Public tester sign-up is available; the form and help pages indicate a truthful tester profile, age 16+ requirement, and PayPal payout path.
deadline_or_currentness: Ongoing; current pages describe paid testing and the help center explains payout timing after approved tests.
evidence_gate: Approved tester account plus completed study and verified PayPal payout.
ai_can_do_next: Prepare a truthful tester profile checklist and privacy note for the user to review.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must sign up, complete screening, and personally perform tests.
automation_boundary: No account creation, login, screening submission, or private profile/payment data handling by Agent1.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: Open access is not income until a paid test is completed and payout is verified.
risk_flags: Screening is selective and payout is PayPal-only according to the public help pages.
known_blockers: Requires truthful tester fit and the ability to complete studies personally.
